Package com.example.getoutthere.event

Class EventListActivity

android.app.Activity
androidx.core.app.ComponentActivity
androidx.activity.ComponentActivity
androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity
com.example.getoutthere.event.EventListActivity
All Implemented Interfaces:
androidx.activity.contextaware.ContextAware, androidx.activity.FullyDrawnReporterOwner, androidx.activity.OnBackPressedDispatcherOwner, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultCaller, androidx.activity.result.ActivityResultRegistryOwner, androidx.appcompat.app.ActionBarDrawerToggle.DelegateProvider, androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.OnRequestPermissionsResultCallback, androidx.core.app.ActivityCompat.RequestPermissionsRequestCodeValidator, androidx.core.app.OnMultiWindowModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnNewIntentProvider, androidx.core.app.OnPictureInPictureModeChangedProvider, androidx.core.app.OnUserLeaveHintProvider, androidx.core.app.TaskStackBuilder.SupportParentable, androidx.core.content.OnConfigurationChangedProvider, androidx.core.content.OnTrimMemoryProvider, androidx.core.view.KeyEventDispatcher.Component, androidx.core.view.MenuHost, androidx.lifecycle.HasDefaultViewModelProviderFactory, androidx.lifecycle.LifecycleOwner, androidx.lifecycle.ViewModelStoreOwner, androidx.navigationevent.NavigationEventDispatcherOwner, androidx.savedstate.SavedStateRegistryOwner, EventFilterFragment.FilterListener
public class EventListActivity extends androidx.appcompat.app.AppCompatActivity implements EventFilterFragment.FilterListener
Displays a list of all currently available events the user can enroll in.

This Activity acts as a Control layer mapping data to a ListView. It queries the Firestore database for all events, populates a custom ArrayAdapter, and handles click events to route the user to the EventDetailsActivity for the selected event.

Outstanding Issues: - Currently fetches all events in a single query. If the database scales up, this will need to implement pagination to prevent performance degradation. - Direct database access in the Activity bypasses standard Repository patterns.

Note: Initial Javadoc and introductory comments generated by Gemini.

    • onCreate

      protected void onCreate(Bundle savedInstanceState)
      Initializes the Activity, fetches the collection of events from Firestore, maps them to the local lists, and binds the data to the ListView via a custom EventDiscoverAdapter.
      Overrides:
      onCreate in class androidx.fragment.app.FragmentActivity
      Parameters:
      savedInstanceState - If the activity is being re-initialized after previously being shut down then this Bundle contains the data it most recently supplied. Otherwise it is null.

    • applySearch

      private void applySearch()
      Applies all active filters and the current search query together against the full events list, then updates the ListView adapter with the results.
      Parameters:
      query - the current search string entered by the user

      Applies all active filters and the current search query together against the full events list, then updates the ListView adapter with the results.
      Parameters:
      query - the current search string entered by the user

    • onFiltersApplied

      public void onFiltersApplied(String eventType, int minCapacity, long minStartDate, long maxStartDate)
      Description copied from interface: EventFilterFragment.FilterListener
      Called when the user applies the configured filters.
      Specified by:
      onFiltersApplied in interface EventFilterFragment.FilterListener
      Parameters:
      eventType - The selected type of event to filter by, or "All" if no specific type is selected.
      minCapacity - The minimum capacity limit for the event.
      minStartDate - The earliest acceptable start date in milliseconds.
      maxStartDate - The latest acceptable start date in milliseconds.
